headline: Tango Holdings Brings Indiana, Ohio Solar Projects Online
summary: Tango Holdings announced it has commenced commercial operations at two new solar projects in Indiana and Ohio. The installations each have 100 MW of generation capacity.

raw.headline: Tango Holdings Brings Indiana, Ohio Solar Projects Online
raw.summary: Tango Holdings announced it has commenced commercial operations at two new solar projects in Indiana and Ohio. The installations each have 100 MW of generation capacity.

headline: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
summary: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

raw.headline: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
raw.summary: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

headline: Cramer’s Stop Trading: American Electric Power Company
